name: Wired Reflexes
description: Use your reaction to make one counter-attack in response to an attack against you.

name: Bionic Arm
description: Unarmed damage goes to 2D6. The arm can hold one gadget that fits into an arm. Add +1 to armor class per arm.

name: Synthetic Muscle
description: Add +1 to Strength and Dexterity modifiers.

name: Dermal Plating
description: Steel plates provide medium armor (+4 AC). Does not stack with worn armor.

name: Spurs
description: Berserker-style claws inflict 2D6 damage. Can be used as a finesse weapon.

name: Cyber Eyes
description: Advantage on vision-based perception checks. Ultravision: thermal, dark, and low-light vision.

name: Cyber Ears
description: Advantage on hearing-based perception checks. Know the location of unseen creatures that make sound within 60ft.

name: Enhanced Memory
description: Choose one additional background. You gain advantage on its tests in addition to your primary background.
